text: Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you help keep our community friendly and safe!
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as an event helper. We can't wait to see the great events you'll help organize!
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to introduce yourself in the general channel and explore all our community has to offer!
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a mentor. We're so grateful you're here to share your knowledge and help new members grow!
